# CodeWise

> AI code reviewer for CS students. CodeWise diagnoses the CS concepts you haven't mastered, traces topic mastery across DSA topics, and generates practice problems at your skill level.

## Pages

- [Home](/): What CodeWise does and how it differs from generic code assistants.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier and Pro plan limits.
- [Explore](/explore): Articles on CS concepts, DSA patterns, and learning strategies.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms and conditions of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy notice covering data collection and user rights.
- [Refunds](/refunds): Refund policy for Pro subscriptions.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/login): Account sign-in.
- [Create account](/signup): Sign up for a free account.
